seo.title: MYReSolve: Less time reporting. More time improving.
seo.description: MYReSolve helps leaders understand where their business stands, what needs attention first and where value may be at risk.

hero.headline: Less time reporting. More time improving.
hero.problemText: MYReSolve helps leaders understand where their business stands, what needs attention first and where value may be at risk.
hero.supportText: Leaders can then choose expert support from MYReSolve or subscribe to the platform to track performance and lead improvement themselves.
hero.supportingLine: One shared starting point for a better leadership conversation.

familiar.intro: For most leaders, weekly and monthly reporting has become an industry in its own right within the company.

observation1.title: Different meeting. Same information. Rebuilt again.
observation1.body: Teams gather and reformat information from across the business for different audiences.

observation2.title: The people closest to the work are pulled into explaining it.
observation2.body: Time spent preparing confidence packs is time not spent improving performance.

observation3.title: The report is finished. The first priority is still unclear.
observation3.body: More information does not always create a clearer decision.

familiar.transitionStatement: Reporting creates visibility. MYReSolve is designed to create clarity.

fromTo.heading: From reporting activity to operational clarity

row2.from: Different views of the same business

row4.to: The real hidden cost of risk

step1.title: Describe your organisation
step1.body: Give the assessment enough context to understand how your operation works.

step2.title: Bring leadership knowledge together
step2.body: Answer 24 structured questions across six operational areas.

step3.title: See where to focus first
step3.body: Get a shared view of operational health, risk, potential exposure and priority areas.

clarity.heading: A clearer leadership conversation
clarity.intro: MYReSolve helps leadership move past “Are we in control?” It opens three more useful questions:

q1.title: What is working?
q1.body: See the overall operational picture and areas of strength.

q2.title: Where is risk building?
q2.body: Compare health and exposure across People, Process, Customer, Operations, Technology and Finance.

q3.title: Where should we focus first?
q3.body: Bring the three highest-risk areas into one shared conversation.

founder.heading: Built from experience. Designed for clarity.
founder.body1: MYReSolve was created by Rob Pierce, drawing on 30 years of experience from frontline delivery through to executive leadership.
founder.body2: That experience has shaped the questions and measures in MYReSolve, helping leaders see what is working, where risk is building and where to focus first.
founder.quote: You can’t improve what you can’t see.
founder.name: Rob Pierce

finalCta.title: Give your team a clearer place to start.
finalCta.body: Start with what your leadership team already knows. Turn that knowledge into a shared view of health, risk and priority.

footer.description: Structured executive assessment for operational health, risk and potential value at risk.
